highlights: Appointment form smart defaults + Pay-button progress fill

sections.title: New Features
items: AppointmentForm auto-fills date/time to now when creating a new appointment
AppointmentForm auto-picks the location from the selected customer's registered branch
AppointmentForm respects the globally-selected location filter as fallback
Pay button on Treatment History rows shows a green progress fill reflecting how much of the service is already paid

highlights: Show saleorder code badge on service rows and payment modal to distinguish duplicate service names

sections.title: New Features
items: Treatment History rows display the saleorder code (SO-...) as a monospace badge
Service payment card inside the payment modal also shows the saleorder code, between the type badge and location badge

highlights: Pay-per-service refactor: locked service context, read-only location, capped multi-source inputs

sections.title: New Features
items: PaymentForm now opens with a locked service context from the invoking row
Location is rendered as a read-only badge inside the service card
Multi-source payment (wallet + cash + bank) is capped at the service residual — overpay is impossible
Submit button label always reflects the true capped total

sections.title: Removed
items: Service picker (invoice/consultation tabs, manual/auto allocation)
Location picker inside payment modal
Generic "Record Payment" CTA on the Payment page and Customer profile

sections.title: Testing
items: New pure allocatePaymentSources() function with 9 unit tests covering cap, clamp priority, and float tolerance
Rewrote PaymentForm component tests (13 cases) for the locked-context contract

highlights: Security hardening: enforce permissions on all API endpoints and improve data integrity

sections.title: Security & Permissions
items: Guard all write endpoints with requirePermission middleware
Stop leaking internal error messages to API responses
Harden Docker Compose and server configuration (env vars, local port, body limit, CORS)

sections.title: Data Integrity
items: Persist employee role fields correctly across updates
Enforce payment void idempotency to prevent duplicate reversals
Allowlist foreign-key tables for safer data operations

highlights: Payment history rows now editable — click expand then Edit button

sections.title: New Features
items: Click to edit payment records from customer profile — opens pre-populated PaymentForm
PaymentForm now supports edit mode with pre-filled notes, date, and reference code

highlights: Treatment records now clickable to edit service details

sections.title: New Features
items: Click treatment records in customer profile to open edit form
Hover effects on treatment record rows to indicate clickability

highlights: Customer code (Mã khách hàng) field now editable in Edit Customer form

sections.title: New Features
items: Make 'Mã khách hàng' field editable in Edit Customer form — saves to API on update

highlights: Location filter now works on all pages including ServiceCatalog and Payment monthly plans

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fix ServiceCatalog page not filtering products by selected location
Fix useMonthlyPlans hook not passing location filter to API

highlights: Fix FilterByLocation dropdown showing empty for admin users

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fix FilterByLocation dropdown rendering empty for admin (all-access) users — now shows all 7 branches

highlights: Fix z-index stacking, employee all-locations button, wait timer color thresholds, sidebar submenu hover

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fix FilterByLocation dropdown rendering behind page content (z-index stacking)
Fix sidebar submenu disappearing when moving mouse to submenu panel
Remove duplicate FilterByLocation from sidebar

sections.title: New Features
items: Add 'Tất cả chi nhánh' button to employee form for selecting all locations
Wait timer color thresholds: green (<10min), orange (10-20min), red (>20min)

highlights: Fixed frozen patient check-in wait timer and live arrival time tracking

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Wait timer now updates every second and shows live seconds instead of frozen < 1m
Check-in now records the actual current time when patient arrives
Existing arrivals fallback to lastupdated timestamp for accurate wait duration

highlights: Fixed location filter dropdown z-index and added location filter to sidebar menu

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed location filter dropdown being hidden under sidebar popouts
Added location filter to expanded sidebar and mobile menu

highlights: Phase 3 architecture shifts — multi-branch employees, admin customer delete, dotkham payment allocation

sections.title: New Features
items: Employee multi-branch assignment via employee_location_scope junction table
EmployeeForm dual-selector for primary and additional branches
Admin two-tier customer delete with soft delete and hard delete permissions
PaymentForm tabbed allocation supporting dotkhams (examination vouchers) and invoices

sections.title: Testing
items: Playwright E2E coverage for Phase 3 architecture shifts

highlights: Two-tier customer delete with permission gating and FK-safe confirmation dialogs

sections.title: New Features
items: Soft delete (Xóa mềm) for customers with permission check customer:delete
Hard delete (Xóa vĩnh viễn) with FK-safe checks for linked appointments, sale orders, and dotkhams
Delete confirmation dialogs show linked record counts before hard delete
Delete actions available in both customer list and customer profile views

sections.title: Backend
items: PATCH /api/Partners/:id/soft-delete endpoint sets isdeleted = true
DELETE /api/Partners/:id/hard-delete returns 409 Conflict when linked records exist

highlights: 🔧 Module consistency fix — unified appointment forms, color picker, status labels

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fix
items: Added color picker to AppointmentForm (create) — was missing, only edit had it
Removed duplicate color definitions from EditAppointmentModal — now uses shared constants
Unified status labels across all appointment views (Đang hẹn / Đã đến / Hủy hẹn)

items: APPOINTMENT_CARD_COLORS now includes previewGradient for color picker dots
Added APPOINTMENT_STATUS_OPTIONS to constants — single source of truth
Added APPOINTMENT_STATUS_LABELS_VI to constants — unified Vietnamese labels
Added @crossref:related[] annotations to 7 module files for future maintenance

highlights: 📐 Reduced appointment card width by 1/3 — fits more in view

Colored cards are more compact, showing more appointments at once
Color still visible but doesn't dominate the view

highlights: 🎨 Fixed appointment card color mismatch across all views

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fix
items: WeekView COLOR_MAP was completely wrong — code 0 (blue) showed as rose/red
All 8 color codes were shifted/incorrect in WeekView
Now all views show the same color for the same appointment

sections.title: 🔧 Architecture
items: Created APPOINTMENT_CARD_COLORS single source of truth in constants/index.ts
WeekView, DayView, TodayAppointments, AppointmentCard all import from one place
Impossible for colors to diverge across views again

highlights: 🎨 Design standardization — All forms match AppointmentForm gold standard

sections.title: 🎨 Design Standard
items: AppointmentForm set as GOLD STANDARD for all modal forms
All 5 forms now use modal-container + modal-content + modal-body pattern
Consistent orange gradient header with Vietnamese titles
Consistent footer with 'Hủy bỏ' + primary action button

sections.title: 🌐 Vietnamese Labels
items: AppointmentForm: Khách hàng, Bác sĩ, Chi nhánh, Dịch vụ, Ghi chú
ServiceForm: Dịch vụ, Khách hàng, Bác sĩ, Chi nhánh, Tổng chi phí, Số răng
PaymentForm: Khách hàng, Dịch vụ, Số tiền, Phương thức thanh toán, Ghi nhận
EmployeeForm: Họ và tên, Điện thoại, Bác sĩ/Trợ lý/Lễ tân, Trạng thái
EditAppointmentModal: Bệnh nhân, Bác sĩ, Chi nhánh, Dịch vụ, Trạng thái, Ghi chú
TodayAppointments header → 'Lịch hẹn hôm nay'
PatientCheckIn header → 'Đón tiếp / Tiếp nhận bệnh nhân'
